name: story-composer-01
title: Story Composer 01
author: ilinxa
description: Instagram-canonical story creation surface — camera-first capture (photo + video + text-only), gallery pick, multi-layer Konva editor (image / drawing / stickers / text / ui-transformer), 6 edit tools (Text / Draw with eraser / Stickers with 36 built-in emoji + extensible / Filters with 10 Instagram-style presets and pre-rendered thumbs / Adjust brightness/contrast/saturation/blur / Crop with 9:16/1:1/4:5), video record (long-press hold OR tap-to-toggle shutter + auto-stop + two-handle trim + overlays baked into final video via canvas.captureStream + MediaRecorder), publish via XHR POST FormData with progress + uploader escape hatch for signed-URL flows, undo/redo on every overlay command, permission-denied auto-retry, discard-confirm guard. Third (and final) component of the story-system trilogy alongside story-rail-01 and story-viewer-01.

files.content:
export { StoryComposer01 } from "./story-composer-01";

export type {
  StoryComposer01Props,
  StoryComposer01Handle,
  StoryComposer01Labels,
  ComposerMode,
  ComposerStage,
  ComposerCtx,
  ValidationError,
  StickerOption,
  StickerSet,
  FontOption,
  FilterPreset,
  KonvaFilterSpec,
  ImageAdjustments,
  TextOverlay,
  PlacedSticker,
  DrawingStroke,
  AspectRatio,
  EditTool,
  PublishMetadata,
  PublishResult,
  PublishedStory,
  PublishedStoryItem,
  Uploader,
} from "./types";

export {
  DEFAULT_STORY_COMPOSER_LABELS,
  DEFAULT_ADJUSTMENTS,
} from "./types";
